hypothesis: Post-freeze residual iteration: v1.3 qualitative evidence-gate extractor prompt plus v2 verifier policy (temporal/current scope and strict qualitative evidence) improves ExECT S5 seizure_frequency precision without recall collapse versus the paper-frozen v1 verifier stack.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is the preregistered residual-iteration gate; it is not a full-validation performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S5 diagnostics (five core families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
High-recall pre-vocab candidates are unchanged; only extractor prompt v1.3 and verifier policy v2 vary.
Baseline for comparison is the paper-frozen v1 verifier stack at 72.3% full-validation frequency F1.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation; treat as schema/gate signal only.
Report per-family F1 and monitor guard families (diagnosis, seizure type, annotated medication, investigation).
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
